description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular design with a flat roof and a mix of light tan brick and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a double garage, a paved driveway, and a main entrance flanked by tall, narrow shrubs. Large windows with arched tops are visible on the side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a small landscaped area with a tree and a car parked in the driveway. The roof has an open courtyard or atrium in the center, visible from above, and the house appears to have a spacious, open-plan interior layout with multiple rooms and visible furnishings.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with tan brick walls, large arched windows, a double garage, and an open central courtyard. The front features a paved driveway, main entrance, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance with shrubs, driveway, and a car parked outside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched windows, brick walls, and the tree near the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open central courtyard, flat roof, and large arched windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage extension, driveway, and the house's overall rectangular footprint.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, flanked by tall shrubs, paved steps, and a small overhang.
